ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "rarity" INTEGER /* Rarity of the unit (e.g., Common, Rare, Epic) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the unit (e.g., Warrior, Mage, Archer) */,
  "element" TEXT /* Element of the unit (e.g., Fire, Water, Earth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_stats" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit */,
  "hp" REAL /* Base HP of the unit */,
  "atk" REAL /* Base ATK of the unit */,
  "def" REAL /* Base DEF of the unit */,
  "magic_str" REAL /* Base Magic STR of the unit */,
  "magic_def" REAL /* Base Magic DEF of the unit */,
  "physical_critical" REAL /* Base Physical Critical rate of the unit */,
  "magic_critical" REAL /* Base Magic Critical rate of the unit */,
  "wave_hp_recovery" REAL /* Base Wave HP Recovery of the unit */,
  "wave_energy_recovery" REAL /* Base Wave Energy Recovery of the unit */,
  "dodge" REAL /* Base Dodge rate of the unit */,
  "physical_penetrate" REAL /* Base Physical Penetrate of the unit */,
  "magic_penetrate" REAL /* Base Magic Penetrate of the unit */,
  "life_steal" REAL /* Base Life Steal rate of the unit */,
  "hp_recovery_rate" REAL /* Base HP Recovery Rate of the unit */,
  "energy_recovery_rate" REAL /* Base Energy Recovery Rate of the unit */,
  "energy_reduce_rate" REAL /* Base Energy Reduce Rate of the unit */,
  "attack_speed" REAL /* Base Attack Speed of the unit */,
  "move_speed" REAL /* Base Move Speed of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_growth_rates" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit */,
  "hp_growth" REAL /* HP growth rate of the unit */,
  "atk_growth" REAL /* ATK growth rate of the unit */,
  "def_growth" REAL /* DEF growth rate of the unit */,
  "magic_str_growth" REAL /* Magic STR growth rate of the unit */,
  "magic_def_growth" REAL /* Magic DEF growth rate of the unit */,
  "physical_critical_growth" REAL /* Physical Critical growth rate of the unit */,
  "magic_critical_growth" REAL /* Magic Critical growth rate of the unit */,
  "wave_hp_recovery_growth" REAL /* Wave HP Recovery growth rate of the unit */,
  "wave_energy_recovery_growth" REAL /* Wave Energy Recovery growth rate of the unit */,
  "dodge_growth" REAL /* Dodge growth rate of the unit */,
  "physical_penetrate_growth" REAL /* Physical Penetrate growth rate of the unit */,
  "magic_penetrate_growth" REAL /* Magic Penetrate growth rate of the unit */,
  "life_steal_growth" REAL /* Life Steal growth rate of the unit */,
  "hp_recovery_rate_growth" REAL /* HP Recovery Rate growth rate of the unit */,
  "energy_recovery_rate_growth" REAL /* Energy Recovery Rate growth rate of the unit */,
  "energy_reduce_rate_growth" REAL /* Energy Reduce Rate growth rate of the unit */,
  "attack_speed_growth" REAL /* Attack Speed growth rate of the unit */,
  "move_speed_growth" REAL /* Move Speed growth rate of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_materials" (
  "unit_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit material */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_materials_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_levels" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the unit */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id", "level")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_levels" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skill */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the skill */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id", "level")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_equipment_stats" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "hp_bonus" REAL /* HP bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "atk_bonus" REAL /* ATK bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "def_bonus" REAL /* DEF bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "magic_str_bonus" REAL /* Magic STR bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "magic_def_bonus" REAL /* Magic DEF bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "physical_critical_bonus" REAL /* Physical Critical bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "magic_critical_bonus" REAL /* Magic Critical bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "wave_hp_recovery_bonus" REAL /* Wave HP Recovery bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "wave_energy_recovery_bonus" REAL /* Wave Energy Recovery bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "dodge_bonus" REAL /* Dodge bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "physical_penetrate_bonus" REAL /* Physical Penetrate bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "magic_penetrate_bonus" REAL /* Magic Penetrate bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "life_steal_bonus" REAL /* Life Steal bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "hp_recovery_rate_bonus" REAL /* HP Recovery Rate bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "energy_recovery_rate_bonus" REAL /* Energy Recovery Rate bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "energy_reduce_rate_bonus" REAL /* Energy Reduce Rate bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "attack_speed_bonus" REAL /* Attack Speed bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  "move_speed_bonus" REAL /* Move Speed bonus of the equipment for the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crafting_recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment or material being crafted */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material required for the recipe */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafting_recipes_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafting_recipes_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units_skills" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skill */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the skill for the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id", "skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_evolutions" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit */,
  "evolution_level" INTEGER /* Evolution level of the unit */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material used for evolution */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id", "evolution_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_evolutions_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_progression" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the unit */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the unit */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment currently equipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_progression_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
